scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c "#6366f1","#8b5cf6" "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -n server,web,storage -c "#6366f1","#8b5cf6","#10b981" "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev:storage -w apps/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build && npm run db:setup
scripts.db:setup: cd apps/server && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss
